title: Death in a White Tie
author: Ngaio Marsh
description: A high-society homicide is the talk of the London season . . ."Marsh's writing is a pleasure." — The Seattle Times It's debutante season in London, and that means giggles and tea-dances, white dresses and inappropriate romances . . ..and much too much champagne. And, apparently, a blackmailer, which is where Inspector Roderick Alleyn comes in. The social whirl is decidedly not Alleyn's environment, so he brings in an assistant in the form of Lord "Bunchy" Gospell, everybody's favorite uncle. Bun...
